items.title: [Stein] Early projections of Trae Young’s new deal with the Washington Wizards: 3 years, $120 million.
items.author: YujiDomainExpansion
items.body_excerpt: Source: https://open.substack.com/pub/marcstein/p/sunday-best-the-latest-nba-intel?r=nuq3a&utm\_medium=ios Early projections on the likely ballpark for Young's new deal with the Wiz: $120 million over three seasons. Young has until June 23 — Night 1 of the draft — to activate or…
